title: MPSet Statement
description: Used when setting the Mass Property Object value.
notes: This is used for setting the properties of Mass Property Objects.
examples:
Function MPTest Integer iVar String sVar$ ' Set each property MPSet MP1.Label, "MP1_Label" MPSet MP1.Description, "MP1_Description" MPSet MP1.Mass, 1 MPSet MP1.GravityCenter, 0, 0, 100 'Acquires the numbers MPGet MP(MP1_Label).Number, iVar Print iVar 'Acquires the labels MPGet MP((iVar)).Label, sVar$ Print sVar$
Fend
